status: v0.9.0 build 13 — 9-issue Dossier fix wave complete — build green
phase: Backlog reduction — Dossier UI stabilization wave
completed_this_session: Issue 1: DossierQueryView now self-loads docCount/chunkCount via loadCounts() on onAppear — removed hardcoded zeros from DossierRootView and DossierKBDetailView callers
Issue 2: Sources accordion fixed — .contentShape(Rectangle()) on button label HStack so full row (including chevron) is tappable
Issue 3: New KB creation now sets selectedTab = .docs immediately after selectedKB = created in DossierRootView alert
Issue 4: DossierQueryView coverCard now shows LLM provider+model via llmLabel computed from SettingsStore.shared.config
Issue 5: DossierChatContent onChange(of: vm.messages.count) now calls onMessageTap?(last) to auto-update sources panel on new assistant response
Issue 6: Same .contentShape fix as issue 2 — accordion arrow now fully tappable
Issue 7: Renamed ATTACHMENTS → SOURCES in DossierMessageBubble.sourcesAccordion
Issue 8: Inline accordion in DossierMessageBubble hidden on iPad (hSizeClass != .compact); DossierSourcesPanel header is now collapsible accordion with chevron
Issue 9: .onKeyPress(keys: [.return]) on TextField in inputBar — Shift+Return inserts newline, plain Return falls through to send
prior_session_completed: M4: Accessibility audit — accessibilityLabel on all interactive elements across Dossier views
DossierRootView: sidebarTabRow .contentShape(Rectangle()) fixes tab hit targets on iPad 3-column layout
DossierRootView: sidebarKBRow context menu — Rename (via RenameSheet) + Delete (via confirmationDialog)
DossierChatView: QUERY tab — LLM banner, NO DOCUMENTS empty state, all header icons verified
DossierArchView: LOG tab — date-grouped sessions, REOPEN button, trash-icon delete with confirmation dialog
KB CRUD: add (+button → alert), rename (long-press), delete (long-press) all verified end-to-end
next: Bump CFBundleVersion to 14 and commit this fix wave
Configure LLM in Settings (Claude or OpenAI API key) to test sources accordion + auto-update live
M1: Multi-KB RRF ranking across KBs
C4: Chat history window config (last N messages)
TestFlight: archive + upload 0.9.0 build 14 via Xcode GUI
CloudKit container: confirm iCloud.com.dhorn.ragflowmobile created in Apple developer portal

key_facts.archive_note: xcodebuild archive from terminal fails with errSecInternalComponent (keychain locked) — use Xcode GUI: Product > Destination > Any iOS Device (arm64), then Product > Archive
key_facts.simulator_build_name: iPhone 16 Pro (OS 18.5) — used for build verification
key_facts.dossier_ipad_layout: DossierIPadLayout in DossierRootView — 3-column HStack: LEFT 240pt sidebar, MIDDLE flex, RIGHT ~30% proportional DossierSourcesPanel via GeometryReader
key_facts.dossier_iphone_layout: DossierKBDetailView with DossierTabBar safeAreaInset at bottom — hSizeClass==.compact portrait
key_facts.dossier_iphone_landscape: DossierIPhoneLandscapeLayout — 200pt sidebar + NavigationStack(DossierKBDetailView); triggers on hSizeClass==.compact && vSizeClass==.compact
key_facts.context_menu_technique: Long-press = mouse_move → left_mouse_down → wait 1.2s → left_mouse_up (right-click does NOT work for iOS context menus in simulator)
key_facts.dossier_tabs: KB=0(KNOWLEDGE BASE), DOCS=1, QUERY=2, FLOW=3, LOG=4(DossierArchiveView)
key_facts.cloudkit_container: iCloud.com.dhorn.ragflowmobile — private DB only; syncs KBs, Books, Sessions, Messages, Workflows
key_facts.chat_params_note: ChatParams(modelOverride, temperature, topP, extraSystemPrompt) — all 3 LLM services accept params
key_facts.sources_accordion_ipad: Inline accordion hidden on iPad (hSizeClass != .compact) — sources show in DossierSourcesPanel right column only
key_facts.sources_auto_update: onChange(of: vm.messages.count) in DossierChatContent calls onMessageTap?(last) to auto-select newest assistant message in sources panel

open_questions: CloudKit container iCloud.com.dhorn.ragflowmobile — confirmed created in developer portal?
